case_title: AURELIO DAMIAN VS. CYPRESS COLLECTION SERVICES DBS CYPRESS

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-01-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

BUSINESS TORT, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAMIAN, AURELIO AS TO DEFENDANT CYPRESS COLLECTION SERVICES DBS CYPRESS PROFESSIONAL SERVICES INC SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-18-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-13-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-03-2009

ARBITRATOR ANTHONY BRENT LEUIN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION FEB-05-2010 THROUGH MAY-06-2010.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-01-2010 CONTINUED TO JUL-13-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON JUN-01-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO PLAINTIFF DAMIAN, AURELIO
